title: Garlicky Norwegian Pudding Skewers
description: A flavorful vegetarian dish featuring intensely garlicky Norwegian pudding, perfect for snacking. Serve on skewers for a fun twist.
instructions: 2. Cut the Norwegian pudding into 1-inch cubes.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together minced garlic, parsley, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the pudding cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic mixture.
5. Thread the coated pudding cubes onto the black skewers.
6. Brush the grill grates with oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the pudding is lightly toasted.
8. Serve the garlicky Norwegian pudding skewers immediately.
